prompt: Full 6-Activity Phase Anatomy for Deployment: deployment-engineer produces 4 files, separate QG, end-of-cycle KC retrospective with prevention rules.
assertions: Rollback triggers have quantitative thresholds (%, ms)
100% AC coverage verified against test results
ACs without passing tests block deployment
Pre-deploy checklist items are all checkable (not vague)
Alert thresholds with specific numbers (error rate, latency, CPU)
Deployment steps documented with pre/post verification
